data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Utilizes AI and machine learning to detect and respond to threats.
data.technical_spec: AI algorithms, anomaly detection, real-time threat intelligence.

data.title: Zero Trust Model
data.description: Implements a security model that verifies every request as though it originates from an open network.
data.technical_spec: Identity verification, inter-device trust, continuous authorization.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances security with multiple layers of user verification processes.

data.title: Data Encryption Protocols
data.description: Employs end-to-end encryption to protect data at rest and in transit.

data.title: Network Firewalls and Intrusion Detection
data.description: Defends against unauthorized access and threats to the internal network.
